Generated from canonical Slay PDF pages for answer engines and crawlers that need page-level content beyond the compact llms.txt summary.

## Slay PDF - Free Local PDF Editor & Adobe Acrobat Alternative
URL: https://slaypdf.com/
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Slay PDF is a free local PDF editor and Adobe Acrobat alternative for splitting, merging, signing, posterising, resizing and editing PDFs entirely in your browser.
H1: Slay PDF

Content:
- Slay PDF
- Slay PDF is a free local PDF editor for splitting, merging, signing, posterising, resizing and editing PDFs without uploading documents to a server.
- Enable JavaScript to use the browser-based PDF workspace. Your documents and edits stay in this browser, and passwords are never saved.

## PDF Tools - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/tools.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Browse Slay PDF tools: merge, split, sign, rotate, crop, resize, redact, compress, OCR, extract text, export images, fill forms and password protect PDFs locally.
H1: Pick a job. Keep the document.

Content:
- The PDF workbench
- Pick a job. Keep the document.
- Thirty useful doors, not three hundred search-engine hallways. Every tool opens the same private browser workspace, with a workflow shaped around the job.
- Tool shelf
- Shape the document
- Build the right page order, dimensions and output before you share anything.
- Mark it up
- Add the human layer: signatures, notes, redactions and useful page furniture.
- Convert and finish
- Turn awkward source material into something compact, searchable and ready to use.

Related links:
- Merge PDF: Bring several documents together and arrange the final page order.: https://slaypdf.com/merge-pdf.html
- Split PDF: Place clean break points and export separate documents in one pass.: https://slaypdf.com/split-pdf.html
- Delete pages: Remove the pages that should never have made the final cut.: https://slaypdf.com/delete-pdf-pages.html
- Organize pages: Reorder, rotate and select pages from a visual workspace.: https://slaypdf.com/organize-pdf-pages.html
- Crop PDF: Trim page edges without sending the document to a server.: https://slaypdf.com/crop-pdf.html
- Resize PDF: Fit pages to standard or custom sizes without stretching their content.: https://slaypdf.com/resize-pdf.html
- Rotate PDF: Correct sideways scans and mixed page orientations.: https://slaypdf.com/rotate-pdf.html
- Posterise PDF: Tile one page across several sheets for large-format printing.: https://slaypdf.com/posterise-pdf.html
- Sign PDF: Place signatures, initials and dates precisely on the page.: https://slaypdf.com/sign-pdf.html
- Annotate PDF: Add text, drawings and highlights to a local document.: https://slaypdf.com/annotate-pdf.html
- Redact PDF: Permanently cover sensitive content before export.: https://slaypdf.com/redact-pdf.html
- Watermark PDF: Apply a clear status, ownership or review mark across pages.: https://slaypdf.com/watermark-pdf.html
- Add page numbers: Number a full document or a selected page range.: https://slaypdf.com/add-page-numbers-to-pdf.html
- Fill PDF forms: Complete form fields and flatten the finished copy.: https://slaypdf.com/fill-pdf-forms.html
- Compress PDF: Reduce file size while keeping control over output quality.: https://slaypdf.com/compress-pdf.html
- OCR PDF: Make English scans searchable directly in the browser.: https://slaypdf.com/ocr-pdf.html
- PDF to images: Export selected pages as crisp image files.: https://slaypdf.com/pdf-to-images.html
- Images to PDF: Combine JPG and PNG images into an ordered PDF.: https://slaypdf.com/images-to-pdf.html
- Extract text: Pull readable text out of selected PDF pages.: https://slaypdf.com/extract-pdf-text.html
- Edit scanned PDF: OCR, clean and annotate documents that began on paper.: https://slaypdf.com/edit-scanned-pdf.html
- Flatten PDF: Bake annotations and form appearances into a dependable final copy.: https://slaypdf.com/flatten-pdf.html
- Protect PDF: Encrypt the exported document with a password.: https://slaypdf.com/password-protect-pdf.html

## Free Local PDF Editor - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/free-pdf-editor.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Use Slay PDF as a free local PDF editor for merging, splitting, signing, resizing, posterising and editing PDFs without uploading documents.
H1: Edit PDFs locally in your browser.

Content:
- Free PDF editor
- Edit PDFs locally in your browser.
- Slay PDF is a free Adobe Acrobat alternative for everyday PDF edits: merge files, split pages, delete pages, sign documents, resize pages and export clean PDFs without uploading anything.
- Private by design
- Your PDF data stays in the browser. Documents are not sent to an app server.
- Useful tools
- Merge, split, reorder, delete, rotate, crop, resize, sign, annotate and posterise PDFs.
- Installable app
- Run it as a static web app and keep recent local workspaces in browser storage.
- A PDF editor for quick work, not account walls.
- Slay PDF focuses on the tasks people usually need immediately: combining pages, removing pages, signing a document, exporting selected pages, adding simple annotations and downloading a finished PDF.
- Because the app runs locally, it is a practical choice for private PDFs, client documents, forms and one-off edits where uploading to a random converter site is not acceptable.

Related links:
- Merge PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/merge-pdf.html
- Split PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/split-pdf.html
- Sign PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/sign-pdf.html
- Acrobat alternative: https://slaypdf.com/adobe-acrobat-alternative.html

## Adobe Acrobat Alternative - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/adobe-acrobat-alternative.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Slay PDF is a free Adobe Acrobat alternative for local PDF edits: merge, split, sign, resize, posterise, annotate and export PDFs in the browser.
H1: A local PDF editor for jobs that should not need Acrobat.

Content:
- Adobe Acrobat alternative
- A local PDF editor for jobs that should not need Acrobat.
- Slay PDF covers everyday PDF editing in a browser: merge pages, split documents, sign PDFs, resize pages, posterise prints, annotate, redact and export.
- No account wall
- Open the app, import a PDF and get the edit done.
- Local by default
- Your files stay in the browser rather than being uploaded to a conversion service.
- Practical exports
- Download all pages, selected pages, separate PDFs, images, text or searchable OCR PDFs.
- Use Acrobat when you need Acrobat. Use Slay PDF for the rest.
- Some enterprise workflows need Adobe's full document platform. Many everyday PDF jobs do not. Slay PDF is aimed at the quick edits people usually need from a PDF tool without the overhead.
- Because it is a static client-side app, it is also a better fit when you care more about keeping files local than syncing documents into another service.
- Adobe Acrobat alternative FAQ
- Yes for everyday PDF edits such as merging, splitting, deleting, reordering, signing visually, annotating, cropping, resizing and exporting pages locally.
- Use Acrobat for enterprise document management, compliance workflows, organization-controlled signing and advanced platform features.

Related links:
- Free PDF editor: https://slaypdf.com/free-pdf-editor.html
- Merge PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/merge-pdf.html
- Split PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/split-pdf.html

## Privacy - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/privacy.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Slay PDF privacy details: PDFs and edits stay in the browser, active workspaces use local browser storage, and export passwords are never saved.
H1: Your PDFs stay in this browser.

Content:
- Privacy
- Your PDFs stay in this browser.
- Slay PDF is a local PDF editor. Documents and edits stay in this browser, and passwords are never saved.
- No app-server uploads
- Editing, previews and exports run in the browser instead of sending documents to a Slay PDF server.
- Local workspace
- Recent workspace data is stored in browser storage so work can continue after a refresh.
- Passwords not saved
- Export passwords are used for the export action only and are never saved by Slay PDF.
- What stays local?
- Imported PDF files, images, page edits, annotations, signatures, form edits, OCR work and exports are handled in the browser. The app is designed as a static site rather than a hosted document processing service.
- What is stored?
- Slay PDF stores the active workspace in browser storage so recent work can be restored. Using New PDF or clearing recent work removes that local workspace state from the app.
- What about passwords?
- Passwords for encrypted PDF exports are not saved. They are used only for the export currently being generated.
- What should I still be aware of?
- Your browser, operating system, extensions, backups, file downloads and network environment are outside Slay PDF's control. Use a trusted device and browser profile for sensitive documents.

Related links:
- Password protect PDF: https://slaypdf.com/password-protect-pdf.html
- All PDF tools: https://slaypdf.com/tools.html

## PDF Privacy & Security Model - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/pdf-privacy-security.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Slay PDF security model for local PDF editing: browser-only processing, local workspace storage, password handling, WebAssembly engines and practical privacy limits.
H1: What local PDF editing actually protects.

Content:
- Security model
- What local PDF editing actually protects.
- Slay PDF is built for no-upload PDF work. This page explains what stays in the browser, what is stored locally, and which risks still belong to the browser, device and user.
- No app-server PDF upload
- Imported files, page previews, edits and exports are handled in the browser instead of being sent to a Slay PDF document processing server.
- Local browser storage
- The active workspace can be saved in browser storage so recent work can reopen after refresh. Clearing the workspace removes that app state.
- Honest limits
- Browser extensions, malware, device backups, downloaded files, shared profiles and network-level hosting infrastructure are outside Slay PDF's control.
- What Slay PDF keeps local
- PDF imports, image imports, page organization, annotations, signatures, form edits, redaction overlays, OCR work and PDF exports run in the browser. The app is deployed as static files rather than a hosted PDF conversion service.
- This local model is useful for contracts, invoices, receipts, school documents, client files and one-off forms where uploading a PDF to an unknown remote processor is the wrong tradeoff.
- What Slay PDF stores
- The active workspace can be stored in browser storage so recent work can continue after refresh. Browser storage is local to the browser profile, not a Slay PDF account. Use New PDF or clear recent work to remove the saved workspace from the app.
- Passwords and encrypted exports
- Passwords used for encrypted PDF exports are not saved by Slay PDF. They are used for the export being generated and should still be handled like any sensitive secret on the user's own device.
- Redaction expectations
- Slay PDF can rasterize pages that contain redaction overlays so covered text and image content is not left selectable behind a rectangle. Always review the exported PDF before sharing sensitive redactions.
- Threats outside the app boundary
- A browser-based local editor cannot protect against a compromised operating system, malicious extensions, screen recording, shared browser profiles, cloud-synced downloads, corporate device monitoring or someone with access to the downloaded PDF.
- Security FAQ
- No. Slay PDF is a static client-side web app, and PDF processing runs in the browser instead of on a Slay PDF app server.
- Potentially, depending on the extension and browser permissions. Use a trusted browser profile and device for sensitive documents.
- No. Export passwords are used for the current export and are never saved by Slay PDF.
- No. It removes app-server document uploads from the workflow, but the browser, operating system, downloads folder, backups and user environment still matter.

Related links:
- Privacy details: https://slaypdf.com/privacy.html
- Redact PDF: https://slaypdf.com/redact-pdf.html
- Password protect PDF: https://slaypdf.com/password-protect-pdf.html

## Merge PDF Files Locally - Slay PDF

Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Merge PDF files locally with Slay PDF. Combine pages, reorder documents, rotate pages and export one PDF from your browser.
H1: Merge PDFs without uploading them.

Content:
- Merge PDF
- Merge PDFs without uploading them.
- Import multiple PDFs or images, drag pages into order, remove the pages you do not need, and export one combined PDF from your browser.
- Combine files
- Drop in PDFs, PNGs, JPEGs or WebP images and turn them into one PDF workspace.
- Reorder pages
- Drag pages, duplicate useful pages, delete extras and rotate pages before export.
- Export locally
- Download the final merged PDF without sending source documents to a remote converter.
- A fast merge PDF tool for everyday documents.
- Slay PDF is built for invoices, forms, scans, images and mixed-page documents that need to become one clean PDF. It also supports selected-page export when you only need a subset.
- If you need to merge PDFs privately, use the app directly from the homepage and keep the workflow local.

Related links:
- Free PDF editor: https://slaypdf.com/free-pdf-editor.html
- Split PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/split-pdf.html

## Split PDF Files Locally - Slay PDF

Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Split PDF files locally with Slay PDF. Delete pages, export selected pages or add split markers to create separate PDFs from one document.
H1: Split a PDF into exactly the pages you need.

Content:
- Split PDF
- Split a PDF into exactly the pages you need.
- Delete unwanted pages, export selected pages, or drop split markers into the workspace so one PDF becomes multiple downloads.
- Selected pages
- Pick the pages you need and export only those pages as a new PDF.
- Separate PDFs
- Use split markers in the workspace to create multiple PDFs in one pass.
- No upload
- The split operation runs locally in your browser, not on a third-party server.
- Designed for extracting pages quickly.
- Slay PDF makes common split workflows straightforward: pull a signed page out of a large file, remove blank pages from a scan, separate chapters, or prepare several smaller PDFs from one source.
- The same workspace also supports rotate, crop, annotations and export options before downloading the finished files.

- Select the blank, duplicate or unwanted pages, delete them from the workspace, and download a clean PDF from your browser.
- Visual page picker
- Review page thumbnails before removing anything from the export.
- Undo support
- Recover from accidental edits while organizing the document.
- Local export
- Download the cleaned PDF without sending source files to a server.
- Clean scans, forms and long documents quickly.
- Slay PDF helps remove empty scan pages, duplicated attachments, cover sheets, mistakes and old pages before sharing a final document.
- You can also reorder, rotate, crop or export selected pages in the same local workspace.

H1: Reorder, delete, rotate, merge and split PDF pages.

Content:
- Organize PDF pages
- Reorder, delete, rotate, merge and split PDF pages.
- Slay PDF is a local page organizer for cleaning up PDFs before export: drag pages, remove pages, rotate scans, merge files and split the result.
- Reorder pages
- Drag pages in the workspace to put the document in the right order.
- Clean up scans
- Delete blank pages, rotate sideways pages, crop margins and resize paper.
- Export your way
- Download one organized PDF, selected pages or multiple PDFs divided by split markers.
- A PDF page organizer for fast cleanup work.
- Use it when a scan has blank pages, pages are out of order, a report needs a cover sheet, a document needs only selected pages, or several smaller files need to become one clean PDF.
- The same workspace also supports page editing tools, so you can add a signature, watermark, page numbers, annotations or redactions before exporting.

- Crop PDF
- Crop PDF pages and trim margins locally.
- Use Slay PDF to crop top, right, bottom and left edges, clean up scanned pages and export a tighter PDF without uploading the file.
- Margin controls
- Adjust each crop edge for the selected page or selected pages.
- Cleaner scans
- Remove scanner borders, blank margins and messy edges before sharing.
- Combine edits
- Crop pages alongside rotation, resizing, annotations and export options.
- Make PDFs easier to read and print.
- Cropping helps when scans have thick borders, slides have too much whitespace, or a PDF page needs to fit a printable area more cleanly.
- Slay PDF keeps that crop workflow local so private scans and documents do not need a third-party converter.

## Resize PDF Pages Locally - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/resize-pdf.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Resize PDF pages locally with Slay PDF. Change paper size, switch orientation and preserve aspect ratio with white letterboxing.
H1: Change PDF page size without stretching the page.

Content:
- Resize PDF
- Change PDF page size without stretching the page.
- Resize selected pages to A4, Letter, Legal, A3, A5, Tabloid or custom dimensions while preserving the original aspect ratio.
- Common sizes
- Switch between common paper sizes and portrait or landscape orientation.
- Custom dimensions
- Use custom millimetre dimensions when a standard paper format is not right.
- No distortion
- Pages are scaled into the new frame with white letterboxes instead of stretching.
- Prepare PDFs for printing, forms and layouts.
- Slay PDF is useful when a document is the wrong paper size, a landscape page needs a portrait frame, or mixed page sizes need to be normalized before printing.
- The resize workflow can be combined with crop, rotate, merge, split and selected-page export.

- Select multiple pages and rotate them together.

- More page edits
- Combine rotation with delete, crop, resize, merge and split workflows.
- Fix scanned pages and mixed-orientation documents.
- Slay PDF is useful when a scan imports sideways, a landscape page appears in a portrait set, or selected pages need orientation cleanup before sharing.
- The rotation happens in the same local workspace as the rest of the PDF editor.

Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Posterise PDF pages locally with Slay PDF. Split one page across multiple printable pages and resize PDFs without stretching content.
H1: Turn a PDF page into printable poster tiles.

Content:
- Posterise PDF
- Turn a PDF page into printable poster tiles.
- Posterise selected pages into rows and columns, choose paper size and orientation, and export printable PDF tiles from your browser.
- Rows and columns
- Choose how many tiles a source page should become.
- Paper sizes
- Use common paper sizes or custom dimensions for resized pages.
- No stretching
- Resized pages preserve aspect ratio and use white letterboxing where needed.
- Useful for posters, signs and large-format prints.
- Slay PDF can split a page into printable tiles when a normal printer is all you have. It also supports page resizing, orientation changes and previewing before export.
- The posterise workflow stays in the same local PDF workspace, so you can combine it with cropping, rotation, annotations and page selection.

## Sign PDF Locally - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/sign-pdf.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Sign PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Add a visual signature, text, highlights and page edits without uploading the document.
H1: Add a signature to a PDF without sending it away.

Content:
- Sign PDF
- Add a signature to a PDF without sending it away.
- Use Slay PDF to place a visual signature, add text, highlight sections, draw rectangles and export the signed PDF from your browser.
- Visual signatures
- Add a signature overlay to the page and position it where it belongs.
- Form-friendly
- Fill supported AcroForm fields and optionally flatten fields on export.
- Private files
- Documents and edits stay in local browser storage. Passwords are never saved.
- For signatures, initials and quick approval marks.
- Slay PDF is useful when you need a visible signature or annotation on a PDF but do not want to create an account or upload the file to a third-party signing site.
- It is not a digital certificate authority. Use a dedicated e-signature platform if your workflow requires legal identity verification, audit trails or certificate-backed signatures.

Related links:
- Free PDF editor: https://slaypdf.com/free-pdf-editor.html
- Merge PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/merge-pdf.html

- Use Slay PDF to add text, highlights, rectangles, ink marks, signatures and redactions before exporting a finished PDF locally.
- Text and signatures
- Place text labels or a visual signature where the document needs them.
- Highlights and shapes
- Mark important sections with highlights, rectangles and ink drawings.
- Move and resize
- Select annotation objects and adjust their position and size in the page editor.
- Quick markup without an account.
- Slay PDF is built for practical document markup: add a note, draw attention to a section, place a signature, black out sensitive text or mark up a form before sending it back.
- Annotations are created in the local browser workspace and flattened into the exported PDF when selected.

## Redact PDF Locally - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/redact-pdf.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Redact PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Place secure redaction blocks and rasterize redacted pages before export.
H1: Cover sensitive PDF content locally.

Content:
- Redact PDF
- Cover sensitive PDF content locally.
- Add redaction blocks to a PDF and export redacted pages as rasterized content so hidden text and image data are removed from those pages.
- Redaction blocks
- Place black redaction rectangles over sensitive areas.
- Rasterized export
- Pages with redactions are rendered before export to remove covered source content.
- Local workflow
- Keep private documents in the browser while preparing the redacted copy.
- For quick private redaction jobs.
- Slay PDF can help redact addresses, account numbers, signatures, notes or other visible content before sharing a PDF.
- Always review the exported file before sending it. Redaction is high stakes, and the final PDF should be checked carefully.

Related links:
- Crop PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/crop-pdf.html
- Free PDF editor: https://slaypdf.com/free-pdf-editor.html

## Watermark PDF Locally - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/watermark-pdf.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Add a watermark to PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Apply draft, confidential or review watermarks before exporting.
H1: Add a watermark before exporting your PDF.

Content:
- Watermark PDF
- Add a watermark before exporting your PDF.
- Apply a text watermark such as DRAFT, CONFIDENTIAL or REVIEW to exported PDFs, with adjustable opacity.
- Text watermark
- Add a clear diagonal watermark to exported pages.
- Opacity control
- Set the watermark strength so it is visible without overwhelming the document.
- Export setting
- Combine watermarks with page numbers, metadata, compression and encryption.
- Mark drafts and internal copies quickly.
- Watermarks are useful for review copies, internal documents, proofs, drafts and files that should not be mistaken for final versions.
- Slay PDF applies the watermark at export time, after page organization and other edits are complete.

- Numbers reflect the order of the exported pages.
- Works after merging
- Combine files first, then number the final PDF.
- Local workflow
- Keep document organization and numbering in the browser.
- Useful for packets, reports and combined documents.
- Page numbers help when you merge multiple files into a single packet, reorder scan pages or create a final document that needs stable references.
- Slay PDF adds page numbers as part of export so they match the final page sequence.

- Add signatures
- Combine form filling with visual signatures and text annotations.

## Compress PDF Locally - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/compress-pdf.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Compress PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Choose compression presets and export smaller PDFs from your browser.
H1: Compress PDF exports from your browser.

Content:
- Compress PDF
- Compress PDF exports from your browser.
- Choose compression presets for screen, ebook or print-style output and download a smaller PDF without uploading the document.
- Export presets
- Pick a compression level that matches the quality and size tradeoff you need.
- Other edits first
- Merge, split, delete, annotate or sign before compressing the export.
- Password option
- Optionally encrypt the exported PDF with a password you provide at export time.
- Reduce file size after the PDF is ready.
- Slay PDF makes compression part of the export process, so you can organize and edit the document before deciding how small the final PDF needs to be.
- Compression results depend on the source PDF. Image-heavy documents usually shrink more than already-optimized text documents.

Related links:
- Merge PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/merge-pdf.html
- Split PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/split-pdf.html

## OCR PDF Locally - Slay PDF

Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Run English OCR on PDFs locally with Slay PDF and export searchable PDFs from your browser.
H1: Create searchable OCR PDFs in the browser.

Content:
- OCR PDF
- Create searchable OCR PDFs in the browser.
- Use Slay PDF to run English OCR and export a searchable PDF with an invisible text layer, while keeping the source document local.
- Searchable export
- Add an invisible text layer to OCR output so text can be selected and searched.
- English OCR
- The app currently bundles English language data for browser-side recognition.
- Local processing
- OCR runs in the browser and avoids app-server uploads.
- Make scanned PDFs easier to search.
- OCR helps with scanned pages, photographed documents and image-only PDFs where the text is not selectable.
- Recognition quality depends on scan clarity, rotation, contrast and language. Always review important OCR output before relying on it.

Related links:
- Extract text: https://slaypdf.com/extract-pdf-text.html
- PDF to images: https://slaypdf.com/pdf-to-images.html
- Free PDF editor: https://slaypdf.com/free-pdf-editor.html

- Private export
- The conversion happens locally in the browser.
- Turn PDF pages into useful image files.
- Image export is useful when a system wants pictures instead of PDFs, when you need a preview image, or when you want to share specific pages visually.
- Slay PDF can combine image export with page selection, rotation, crop, annotations and other local edits.

- Drop images into Slay PDF, arrange them with PDF pages, then export one clean PDF without uploading the files to an app server.

- Add PNG, JPEG and WebP images to the same workspace as PDFs.
- Page order
- Drag images into the right order and rotate pages before export.
- One PDF
- Download the final document as a PDF generated in the browser.
- For scans, receipts, photos and attachments.
- Use Slay PDF when a set of image files needs to become one PDF packet. You can also combine images with existing PDF pages, add page numbers or resize pages before export.
- The workflow stays local, so the source images remain in your browser instead of being uploaded to a conversion service.

- Choose the pages that matter before exporting text.
- OCR option
- Use OCR export for image-only scanned PDFs that do not contain selectable text.
- Pull text out of normal PDFs quickly.
- Text extraction is useful for copying content from reports, forms, invoices, statements and other PDFs that already contain embedded text.
- For scans and photos, use Slay PDF's searchable OCR export to create a text layer first.

- Rotate sideways pages and reorder scans before export.
- Clean margins
- Crop rough edges, remove blank pages and resize output pages.

- Run English OCR for scans that need selectable search text.
- For scanner output that needs cleanup.
- Scanned PDFs often need quick repairs before they are usable: page rotation, blank-page removal, cropping, splitting, OCR or selected-page export.
- Slay PDF keeps that cleanup workflow in the browser so private scans do not need to be uploaded to a random conversion service.

Content:
- Flatten PDF
- Fill and flatten supported PDF forms.
- Edit supported AcroForm fields locally, then export a flattened copy when you need field values baked into the PDF.
- Supported fields
- Edit text, checkbox, dropdown, list and radio fields where the PDF exposes them.
- Flatten export
- Optionally flatten supported form fields so values stay in the exported file.
- Local form work
- Fill and export forms in the browser without app-server document uploads.
- For forms that need a clean final copy.
- Flattening is useful when a filled PDF should be sent as a stable copy rather than a form that keeps editable fields.
- PDF form support depends on how the source file was built. Some forms are simple AcroForms, while others are scans or complex documents that need manual annotations instead.

## Password Protect PDF Locally - Slay PDF
URL: https://slaypdf.com/password-protect-pdf.html
Last modified: 2026-07-14
Summary: Password protect PDF exports locally with Slay PDF. Encrypt exported PDFs with AES-256 from your browser.
H1: Encrypt PDF exports with a password.

Content:
- Password protect PDF
- Encrypt PDF exports with a password.
- Add password protection to exported PDFs after editing, merging, splitting or compressing the document in your browser.
- AES-256 export
- Use password encryption when downloading the final PDF.
- Passwords not saved
- The app uses the password for export and does not save it in the workspace.
- Works with edits
- Protect the file after merge, split, annotations, compression or OCR export.
- Protect the finished copy, not a random upload.
- Slay PDF can encrypt exported PDFs with a password while keeping the editing workflow in the browser.
- Choose a strong password and share it through a separate channel if the document is sensitive.

Related links:
- Compress PDFs: https://slaypdf.com/compress-pdf.html
- Free PDF editor: https://slaypdf.com/free-pdf-editor.html
